events.name: 初回オアシスイベント

parameters: It seems there are no dangerous animals around here.
An oasis~... If only I had a swimsuit~

(Mom in a swimsuit... I want to see that! I wonder if
I can get one somewhere...)
Playing in the water with Mother
Wow~! Mother, you look great in that swimsuit...\i[12]

R...really? Thanks, but it's been so long since I've
worn a swimsuit.

Ah~ feels good♪ Let's just enjoy this vacation mood
for now!

As Mother leans forward, her ample breasts sway
gently...

Mother is frolicking with a smile as bright as a young
girl's...

Even though she's my mother, she's still so
cute...\i[12] Having a mother like this would
definitely turn anyone into a hardcore momma's boy...!

For a while, the two of us played around splashing
water at each other like a couple in love...

\V[3]...it must be tough with your dick like that, all
tented up...

It's all because of how you look in that swimsuit...!
Maybe you should take responsibility!

Well...I guess I have no choice. Let Mommy make you
feel better\i[12]

Exhausted from our activities, we rested our bodies
under the shade of a tree for a while...
